prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fashion poster in a dark, atmospheric editorial style. The image shows a close-up portrait of an androgynous young woman with a short messy black bob haircut, pale skin, sharp cheekbones, and a serious distant expression, turned slightly three-quarters to the viewer. Only one eye is clearly visible, accented with deep red smoky eye makeup; lips are dark muted plum. Her face is partially obscured by soft gray fog, translucent haze, and a delicate curved oval shard-like outline crossing over the face, as if seen through a thin piece of glass or a memory fragment. She wears a high-collared black coat or tailored jacket with a subtle dark red accent near the lower right. Lighting is moody and low-key, with a soft highlight on the visible cheek and forehead, heavy shadows, shallow depth of field, film grain, and a blurred charcoal-to-off-white background. Composition: portrait centered slightly to the right, head occupying the upper half, shoulders fading into darkness at the bottom. Add elegant magazine/poster typography in the lower left: large serif title text with exactly 2 stacked words, “AFTER” in warm ivory and “LIGHT” in dark blood red. Include exactly 4 additional small text elements: top-right tiny monospaced text “FRAME 05:56”; beneath the title a thin spaced-out line reading “VISIBLE FOR A SECOND      MEMORY HOLDS THE EDGE”; a tiny mark near the lower-left reading “1.9”; and a bottom-left spaced-out line reading “WHAT THE SHADOW COULD NOT KEEP”. Use a refined art-house film poster aesthetic, smoky texture, muted desaturated palette, off-white margins of haze, realistic skin detail, no extra people, no extra text, no logos, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a vertical cinematic fashion poster in a dark, atmospheric editorial style. The image shows a close-up portrait of an androgynous young woman with a short messy black bob haircut, pale skin, sharp cheekbones, and a serious distant expression, turned slightly three-quarters to the viewer. Only one eye is clearly visible, accented with deep red smoky eye makeup; lips are dark muted plum. Her face is partially obscured by soft gray fog, translucent haze, and a delicate curved oval shard-like outline crossing over the face, as if seen through a thin piece of glass or a memory fragment. She wears a high-collared black coat or tailored jacket with a subtle dark red accent near the lower right. Lighting is moody and low-key, with a soft highlight on the visible cheek and forehead, heavy shadows, shallow depth of field, film grain, and a blurred charcoal-to-off-white background. Composition: portrait centered slightly to the right, head occupying the upper half, shoulders fading into darkness at the bottom. Add elegant magazine/poster typography in the lower left: large serif title text with exactly 2 stacked words, “AFTER” in warm ivory and “LIGHT” in dark blood red. Include exactly 4 additional small text elements: top-right tiny monospaced text “FRAME 05:56”; beneath the title a thin spaced-out line reading “VISIBLE FOR A SECOND      MEMORY HOLDS THE EDGE”; a tiny mark near the lower-left reading “1.9”; and a bottom-left spaced-out line reading “WHAT THE SHADOW COULD NOT KEEP”. Use a refined art-house film poster aesthetic, smoky texture, muted desaturated palette, off-white margins of haze, realistic skin detail, no extra people, no extra text, no logos, no watermark.
promptZh:
目标：为 AFTER LIGHT 创建一张竖版电影艺术海报，将编辑风格的人像摄影与抽象的玻璃/反射效果以及情绪化的电影排版相结合。

画布：高竖版海报，比例约为 2:3。采用深色、低饱和度色调，包含雾灰色、炭黑色、浅肤色、深血红色点缀以及暖象牙色的标题字体。添加细腻的胶片颗粒、灰尘、柔和的暗角以及朦胧的模拟打印质感。

主体：一位中性风东亚女性 的四分之三特写肖像，留着黑色短波波头，面部略微朝右。可见的面部表情平静、疏离且冷峻。一只眼睛清晰可见，带有戏剧性的红色眼影、光泽感皮肤高光、哑光深色唇妆以及轮廓分明的颧骨阴影。主体穿着高领黑色外套或夹克，胸前有隐约的深红色内衬或类似领带的装饰。

光学效果：面部部分被烟雾状的半透明灰色模糊遮挡，仿佛透过起雾的玻璃观看。包含一片明显的叶状透明玻璃/折射切片，垂直穿过面部，使切片内的眼睛和脸颊更加清晰，而周围的面部则显得柔和且阴暗。头部和肩部的左侧应融入黑暗的雾气中；右侧背景应渐变为浅灰白色的薄雾。

文字内容：包含 5 个清晰可见的文字元素：1) 右上角微小的技术标签：“FRAME 05:56”；2) 左下角分两行的大标题，上方为象牙色衬线大写字母“AFTER”，下方为深红色衬线大写字母“LIGHT”；3) 标题下方带有间距的小号大写说明文字：“VISIBLE FOR A SECOND      MEMORY HOLDS THE EDGE”；4) 左下角附近微小的标记：“1.0”；5) 左下角带有间距的小号大写行，内容为 WHAT THE SHADOW COULD NOT KEEP。标题使用优雅的高对比度编辑风格衬线字体，说明文字使用小号等宽字体或带有间距的无衬线字体。

构图：主体略微偏右居中，头部占据上方三分之二，肩部融入黑暗中。标题固定在左下角，不遮挡面部。保持海报极简、大气且神秘，无需额外标志、其他文字或边框。
